title: Drodi's Illagers x Fresh Animation
description: Makes Drodi's Illagers compatible with Fresh Animations!
body:
# Requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)/[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica) (optional)

Can’t decide between Drodi’s Illagers and [**Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)? Now you don’t have to!

**Drodi’s Illagers x Fresh Animations** is a patch for **Fresh Animations** so you can have all the features from both packs.

For it to work properly, you need to download:

- Drodi’s Illagers x Fresh Animations
- [**Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
  

In the resource pack list, place Fresh Animations below Drodi’s Illagers x Fresh Animations or it won’t work!

![load order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b78dd5e191c283faa3647cdbee5009856b8d2ce.png)

<details>
<summary>OFFICIAL SOURCES</summary>



The OFFICIAL versions of my packs are available here on Modrinth under the profile [@Drodi](https://modrinth.com/user/Drodi), on Planet Minecraft under the profile [Drodi](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/drodi/) and on Curseforge ([Dordinatteur](https://www.curseforge.com/members/dordinatteur/projects)). Any other source may contain viruses or malwares, so if you want to download from other sites, do so at your own risk.

If you believe someone else is reuploading my Ressource packs on other sources and action is possible, please contact me on discord (drodi99)

</details>

<details>
<summary>CREDITS</summary>

- [Fresh LX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) for allowing me to upload this compatibility patch on modrinth.
- [Keniu](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/kemiu/) & [Rustillery](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/rustillery/) : Their packs, "[Illagers Reborn](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/illagers-reborn-1-15/)" and "[Rustillery's Classy Illagers](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/rustillery-s-classy-illagers/)" respectively were used as inspiration.
- [Reijvi](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/reijvi/) : General inspiration for the style of the pack. Multiple color palettes are re used from his pack, "[Reimagined](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/minecraft-reimagined-5096190/)", including leather and iron.
